+# RLOS Implementation Blueprint & Logic Audit
+
+## Executive Summary
+
+This document crystallizes the design of the **Rhetorical‑Linguistic Operating System** (RLOS) into a locked‑down blueprint suitable for automated implementation. It synthesizes the theoretical framework into actionable modules, identifies logical invariants and potential failure points, and embeds a work sequence that GitHub Copilot can follow. The goal is to minimize manual intervention: the automation agent “stuffs the turkey” by executing pre‑specified tasks without having to design or question the architecture.
+
+## 1. Logic Audit
+
+The RLOS design rests on a layered plexus architecture in which linguistic analysis and generation occur across nine modules. Several key logical principles must hold:
